title: Eight-hertz organizing-frequency hypothesis
description: Early test proposal; 8 Hz is not asserted to be a universal constant.
test_method: Compare predefined outcomes at 7.834, 8.000, 8.200 Hz and sham control.
predicted_observation: A preregistered outcome differs from all controls by the stated threshold.
falsification_condition: No replicated, corrected effect relative to the null and control frequencies.
confusion_guard: Numerical matching does not prove physical equivalence.
